response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of generalist engineering across diverse domains and languages, with genuine high-throughput distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/second) and a current staff-level role touching AI-agent infrastructure. However, the role demands deep, specialized expertise in experimentation platforms—A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, and rollout-risk management—none of which appear anywhere in the resume. His career arc is product-focused rather than platform-focused, shows no cross-team architectural leadership at IC6 scale, and lacks any demonstrated growth engineering or measurement systems background, making him a poor fit for this specific role despite solid foundational credentials.
strengths: High-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec) demonstrates ability to work at meaningful engineering scale
Broad multi-language fluency including C, C++, C#, Java, and TypeScript/JavaScript aligns with the required technical stack
Current staff-level role includes AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, showing some platform-adjacent sensibility
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no mention of A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, rollout automation, or bias detection anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis background; measurement and data aptitude skills appear entirely absent
Resume reflects senior IC product engineering across many domains rather than the deep, focused, cross-team Principal-level platform leadership this role requires

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth systems experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
